chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-1847 of 2017 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ Direction 1. For order on CMA No.11096/2021 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No.27955/2020 (Contempt) 16.04.2021 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG ------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. This petition was disposed of vide judgment dated 16.04.2018 with direction to the Managing Director/Competent Authority of respondent-authority to take a fresh decision so far as the matters of the petitioner are concerned, for regularization of their services, without discrimination and under law and dicta laid down by the Hon’le Supreme Court, within two months. Compliance report was filed and his contempt application bearing CMA No.7413/2019 was disposed of with the direction to the petitioners to pursue their remedy against non-regularization of their service by the respondent-authority. Petitioner Yasir Ali Baloch is present in person submits that he may be allowed to pursue his remedy by calling in question the non- regularization of his service by the respondent-authority before the appropriate forum. In view of his statement, the contempt application bearing CMA No.27955/20 is disposed of as not pressed, leaving him at the liberty to assail the findings of respondent authority, whereby his regularization was declined. J U D G E J U D G E Nadir/P.A
